zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis I de Dampierre於1272年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，他的父親Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen23歲，母親Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers25歲。他於1290年12月16日與Joan Countess of Rethel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年7月24日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年50歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis I de Dampierre was born in 1272, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen, was 23 and his mother, Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers, was 25. He married Joan Countess of Rethel on 16 December 1290. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 July 1322, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis I de Dampierre est né en 1272, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Countess of Rethel le 16 décembre 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1322, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis I de Dampierre 1272 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen 23 und seine Mutter Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers 25. Er hat am 16. Dezember 1290 Joan Countess of Rethel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Juli 1322 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis I de Dampierre è nato il nel 1272 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Countess of Rethel il 16 dicembre 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 luglio 1322, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis I de Dampierreが1272年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderenは23歳，母Yolande de Bourgogne II of Neversは25歳であった。1290年12月16日にJoan Countess of Rethelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年7月24日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで50歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis I de Dampierre(이)가 1272년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1290년 12월 16일 Joan Countess of Rethel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 7월 24일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis I de Dampierre nasceu em 1272, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Countess of Rethel em 16 de dezembro de 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1322, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis I de Dampierre родился в 1272 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Countess of Rethel 16 декабря 1290 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 июля 1322 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis I de Dampierre nació en 1272, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert de Béthune III Graaf van Vlaanderen, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Countess of Rethel el 16 de diciembre de 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de julio de 1322, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
